message:
fix: update test to match AddDependency type-change rejection (bd-7z5)

TestChildParentDependencies_PreservesParentChildType was failing because
AddDependency no longer upserts (ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE) — it now rejects
adding a dependency with a different type for the same key pair. Restructured
the test to create parent-child and blocks deps on separate child issues
instead of trying to overwrite one with the other.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/opal
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
